channel.title: Abouts on Scott's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Scott's Blog

item.title: Travel
item.description: 09.2022 Summer Palace 08.2022 Mount Tai 08.2022 Ji Nan 08.2022 Temple of Heaven 08.2022 Beijing 07.2022 Weishan 05.2022 Beijing World Park 11.2021 Beijing

item.title: About Me
item.description: 04.2022 这个月的最后一个工作日，也是我在这家公司的最后一天。 12.2020 Faceing the reality, I have to start my new job again. 01.2020 Because of the COVID-19, the company is closed. Because everyone is not allowed to go out, I can’t find a new job. Then I decided to do a project with my friends. In this year, I learned Javaand VUE, we did a project. Then use docker to deploy in the Linux server. Although I didn’t get a dood income, but I learned a lot in this year.

item.title: About Me
item.description: My Journey (you can click me☺️) Personal Information Name: Scott Tao (Baitong Tao) Occupation: iOS Developer (2013 – today) Bachlor (Computer Science and Technology) Birthday: 12.1990 Address: Iserlohn, Deutschland Email ① im.taobaitong@gmail.com ② Scott.Tao@88.com 08.2022 五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳 No mountain is more gorgeous than the Five Great Mountains until you pay a visit to Mount Huang.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Personal Information Name: Scott Tao (Baitong Tao) Occupation: iOS Developer (2013 – today) Bachlor (Computer Science and Technology) Address: Iserlohn, Deutschland Kontact Email ① im.taobaitong@gmail.com ② Scott.Tao@88.com
